title: Ordinary-invocation action selection: factor-derived depth without activation keywords (SUPPLEMENTARY, A-series, per issue #52)
not_in_primary_campaign: A1 is part of the separately versioned ordinary-invocation behavioral campaign (A-series, issue #52). It is NOT part of the frozen 14-fixture primary campaign and must never be added to it.
mission: Using /implementaudit, get the flaky release pipeline fixed across the repo. The pipeline spans scripts, checkers, CI config, and package gates; flakiness is unmeasured; the follow-on executor may be a weaker fresh-context session.
planted_defect: the request is ordinary and task-shaped with no activation keyword; a defective run either stays shallow because no keyword was present, or deepens without recording why
expected_correct_behavior: derive the warranted ydqyq-audit-action set from the seven factors (scope, uncertainty, risk, dependencies, evidence gaps, authorization state, intended executor); record selected AND considered-but-omitted actions with reasons in an action-selection record; perform the deeper actions; never cite keyword absence as a selection reason

properties.name: action_selection_recorded
properties.describes: an explicit action-selection record exists in the run's own voice

properties.name: factors_derived
properties.describes: the selection derives from named live factors, not vibes

properties.name: deeper_actions_selected
properties.describes: warranted deeper actions were actually selected and performed

properties.name: no_keyword_gating
properties.describes: keyword absence is never cited as the reason to stay shallow (and no keyword is cited as the reason to deepen)
